LanguageData.RimChat_PleasantChatMemory.stages.0.desc: I had a pleasant chat that left me in better spirits.
I had a meaningful conversation that stayed with me.
LanguageData.RimChat_SlightedMemory.stages.0.label: slighted in conversation
LanguageData.RimChat_SlightedMemory.stages.0.descript: The conversation left me feeling slightly slighted.
